# layer

**Instance Property**

The layer represented by this layer hierarchy.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var layer: CALayer? { get set }
```

## Overview

Set this property to the root layer of the hierarchy that you host in a [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/LayerHierarchyHostingView] in the browser app.
title: layer
